name: hoc/sidebar-menu-tree
description: A recursive sidebar navigation tree HOC that renders nested menu items with collapsible groups, active-state highlighting, and icon support. Provides SidebarMenuTree, SidebarMenuTreeItem, SidebarMenuTreeGroup, and SidebarMenuTreeGroupLabel primitives with keyboard arrow navigation and ARIA tree semantics. Composed of Collapsible, Button, and Badge components for expandable nested sections.
useCases: Documentation site sidebars with nested topic hierarchies (Getting Started > Installation > CLI)
Admin dashboards with multi-level navigation (Analytics > Reports > Revenue > Monthly)
File-manager folder trees displaying directories with nested sub-folders and file counts
Settings sidebars grouping categories into expandable parent items with child links
usage: import { SidebarMenuTree, SidebarMenuTreeItem, SidebarMenuTreeGroup, SidebarMenuTreeGroupLabel } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/sidebar-menu-tree"
